meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Scale Your Freelance Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn how to master Claude Code skills setup to automate your freelance development and deliver high-quality projects faster.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance projects, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate, refactoring, and documentation. By setting up custom skill-based workflows, you move from manual coding to architecture oversight, allowing you to handle three times the client volume without sacrificing quality or burning out on repetitive tasks.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a mounting backlog of client requests, trapped in the ‘manual-coding-loop’ where every hour spent on boilerplate is an hour stolen from your profitability. The dream of a scalable freelance agency is dying under the weight of repetitive tasks and fragmented codebases that refuse to cooperate.

But the tide is turning. By mastering Claude Code’s agentic capabilities paired with the architectural precision of Antigravity, you can transform your terminal into a high-leverage engine. It’s time to stop typing every line and start orchestrating your output like a lead engineer.

steps.title: Initialize the Agent Environment
steps.description: Establish a consistent workspace for your Claude Code agent to ensure it understands your project architecture before it starts writing code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing directory structure and generate a system-level configuration file that defines project standards, naming conventions, and preferred tech stack for Claude Code to follow.

steps.title: Define Project Skills
steps.description: Create reusable skill definitions so Claude Code can perform complex refactoring tasks consistently across multiple client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a library of specialized coding tasks (skills) including 'unit-test-generation', 'api-documentation', and 'legacy-code-refactoring' that Claude Code can execute on demand.
steps.claude_code_command: claude skill --create --name refactor-api --logic 'apply clean architecture patterns to existing endpoints'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Leverage your setup to eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome by generating production-ready scaffolds in seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a full-stack Next.js scaffold with authentication, database ORM integration, and standard error handling patterns as defined in our project specs.

steps.title: Implement Agent-Driven Testing
steps.description: Shift the testing burden to your AI agent by enabling automated bug detection before code ever hits the staging server.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a continuous monitoring loop where Claude Code reviews all new pull requests against the established unit testing suite and flags architectural regressions.

steps.title: Execute Scale-Out Deployment
steps.description: Use your refined workflow to push updates across multiple micro-services simultaneously, ensuring synchronization across all client deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a deployment script that validates all project modules against the current master branch, then proceeds to build and push to production with zero-downtime triggers.

pro_tips: Use custom 'context-tags' in your `.claude-ignore` file to prevent the agent from hallucinating based on non-essential boilerplate files.
Always run `claude --plan` before executing complex refactors to preview the agent's logic chain and avoid breaking changes.
Maintain a 'Golden Prompt' file in your root directory that Claude Code can reference to maintain your specific coding style across all client projects.
Treat your Claude Code CLI commands like a Makefile; alias your most frequent agentic workflows for one-tap execution.
Use the `--memory` flag to allow Claude Code to recall architectural decisions from previous sessions, drastically reducing setup time for recurring client work.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder structure, then map out your top three most repetitive coding tasks to automate using the skills you just defined.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for code and start building a high-leverage development system that scales. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
